title: rhododendron anthopogonoides subsp. hoi
intro: Rhododendron anthopogonoides subsp. hoi, also known as the Korean Rhododendron or Korean Azalea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to Korea and northeastern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rhododendron anthopogonoides subsp. hoi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
